meta.purpose: Small-batch continuation audit for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support with athlete identity kept unambiguous. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, current-event rows without row-level extraction, and different-name rows stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

batchScope.reasonForAudit: Prior Lot 71-75 batch exists, but explicitly left the HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press D/E速報 PDF at locator-only status without row-level extraction. This run preserves that separation and records that no safe promotion was made.
batchScope.openPrCheck: Open PR check before this run found only #111, a non-overlapping completion report generator that does not mutate data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, or A4 print layout.
batchScope.writeScope: Research batch log only. No data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, app runtime, CSS, generator logic, print template, A4 layout, or v5.9.6_LOCK changes.

sourceIndex.title: Existing Lot 71-75 research batch on main
sourceIndex.auditFinding: Processed the same five athletes and recorded no confirmed prior histories or candidate findings. The HPA Numata D/E速報 source was locator-only and not row-level extracted in that run.

sourceIndex.title: 第30回北海道クラシックベンチプレス選手権 D/Eグループ 速報
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Still not promoted in this audit because a safe row-level extraction was not completed in this connector-backed run. Current-event Numata results for Lot 71-75 remain unasserted.

sourceIndex.title: 第29回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会 結果
sourceIndex.auditFinding: Existing prior batch recorded no exact-name Lot 71-75 matches in this source; this audit did not add any new confirmed row from it.

sourceIndex.title: GitHub open PR check
sourceIndex.auditFinding: Only open PR found: #111 Add Numata completion report generator. Non-overlapping with athlete data mutation and A4 layout.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: No new source-backed athlete histories were confirmed in this audit, and unresolved current-event row extraction remains outside confirmed history. This preserves the no-inference rule and avoids duplicate work from the existing Lot 71-75 batch.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Perform true row-level extraction of the HPA 2026 Numata D/E速報 PDF before adding current-event result rows, or move to an unresolved candidate sweep only when a specific official/high-trust same-name row is located.
